nextpk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.AttendanceModel
 
nextpk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CollegeModel
Generates and returns the next available primary key for the ST_COLLEGE table.
nextpk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CourseModel
Generates and returns the next available primary key for the ST_COURSE table.
nextpk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.GiftcardModel
 
nextpk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.GymTrainerModel
 
nextpk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.LockerModel
 
nextpk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.RoleModel
Returns the next available primary key for the ST_ROLE table by fetching the current maximum ID and incrementing it by 1.
nextpk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.SubjectModel
Returns the next available primary key for the ST_SUBJECT table by fetching the current maximum ID and incrementing it by 1.
nextpk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Returns the next available primary key for the ST_TIMETABLE table by fetching the current maximum ID and incrementing it by 1.
nextpk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
Returns the next available primary key for the ST_USER table by fetching the current maximum ID and incrementing it by 1.
nextPk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.MarksheetModel
Returns the next available primary key for the ST_MARKSHEET table by fetching the current maximum ID and incrementing it by 1.
nextPk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.StudentModel
Returns the next available primary key for the ST_STUDENT table by fetching the current maximum ID and incrementing it by 1.
